result:
Here's the payment processing and billing landscape in this codebase:

---

## Payment Gateway Integrations (Models)

| File | Class/Key Methods | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/razorPay.php` | `initiatePayment()` :158, `checkPaymentStatus()` :242, `recordPaymentIntent()` :603 | Razorpay gateway integration |
| `app/paytm.php` | `initiatePayment()` :34, `voidPayment()` :559, `refundPayment()` :784 | Paytm gateway integration |
| `app/snapMint.php` | `createPaymentIntent()` :81, `checkPaymentStatus()` :267, `refundPaymentIntent()` :464, `snapmintPaymentResponse()` :832 | SnapMint BNPL integration |
| `app/Services/PaymentMappingService.php` | `PaymentMappingService` :16 | Payment method mapping service |

## Billing Controllers

| File | Class/Key Methods | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Controllers/BillingWeb.php` | `BillingWeb` :14 | Billing web API (v1) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/BillingWeb.php` | `BillingWeb` :69, `getStorePaymentSetting()` :541, `fetchPaymentValues()` :2603 | Billing web API (v2) |

## Order Payment & Settlement

| File | Key Methods | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Order.php` | `creditSettlement()` :2581 | Credit settlement on orders |
| `app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php` | `creditSettlement()` :222 | Credit settlement controller endpoint |
| `app/OnlineOrder.php` | `refundEcomPayment()` :4852, `refundEcomOrder()` :4663 | E-commerce order payment refunds |
| `app/CashManagement.php` | `createTenderDeclarationTransaction()` :14, `fetchTenderDeclarationTransaction()` :54 | Cash/tender management |

## Refund Logic (Controllers)

| File | Key Methods | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Http/Controllers/appController.php` | `refundRazorpayPayment()` :3630, `refundSnapmintPayment()` :3695, `refundPaytmPayment()` :3829 | Refund endpoints for each gateway |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/ScriptController.php` | `refundRazorpayPayment()` :514 | Razorpay refund (v2) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/basicAppController.php` | `snapmintPaymentResponse()` :2952 | SnapMint callback handler |

## Accounting & License Payments

| File | Key Methods | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Account.php` | `paymentAccountIDMapping()` :76, `paymentsCheck()` :108, `createPayments()` :370 | Accounting payment integration |
| `app/Accounting.php` | `Accounting` :15 | Accounting module |
| `app/Admin.php` | `licensePaymentWithTotal()` :4390 | SaaS license/subscription payments |
| `app/partner.php` | `payment()` :736 | Partner payment processing |

## Currency & Tender Validation

| File | Key Method | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Flight.php` | `tenderCurrencyValidation()` :2822 | Multi-currency tender validation |
| `app/Http/Controllers/CurrencyApp.php` | `tenderCurrencyValidation()` :31 | Currency tender controller (v1) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/CurrencyApp.php` | `tenderCurrencyValidation()` :31 | Currency tender controller (v2) |

## Invoicing

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Services/InvoiceNumberService.php` | Invoice number sequence generation |
| `app/NectorInvoice.php` | Nector platform invoice integration |
| `app/Jobs/CreateRazorpayInvoice.php` | Async Razorpay invoice creation |
| `app/Jobs/SendInvoiceJob.php` | Async invoice delivery |
| `app/Jobs/GlobalEcomInvoiceJob.php` | E-com invoice generation |
| `app/Jobs/PinelabsDigitalInvoiceJob.php` | Pine Labs digital invoice |

## Background Jobs (Payment)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Jobs/CaptureRazorpayPaymentsJob.php` | Capture authorized Razorpay payments |
| `app/Jobs/EcomPendingPaymentJob.php` | Process pending e-com payments |
| `app/Jobs/EcomVoidOrderPaymentRefundJob.php` | Void/refund e-com order payments |
| `app/Jobs/ExpireOrderPaymentRefundJob.php` | Expire and refund stale payments |
| `app/Jobs/RefundOnlineOrderJob.php` | Refund online orders |
| `app/Jobs/AutomateLicensePaymentJob.php` | Auto-process license/subscription payments |
| `app/Jobs/beepkartUpdatePaymentJob.php` | Beepkart payment sync |
| `app/Jobs/PBMChallanPaymentJob.php` | Municipal challan payment |
| `app/Jobs/TMCPaymentJob.php` | TMC payment processing |
| `app/Jobs/reSyncMunicipalPaymentJob.php` | Re-sync failed municipal payments |

## Artisan Commands (Payment)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Console/Commands/captureRazorpayPayments.php` | Cron: capture Razorpay payments |
| `app/Console/Commands/automateLicensePayment.php` | Cron: auto license billing |
| `app/Console/Commands/ecomPendingPaymentStatusCheck.php` | Cron: check pending e-com payment status |
| `app/Console/Commands/checkFailedUPPCLPayment.php` | Cron: retry failed UPPCL payments |
| `app/Console/Commands/postAdvancePaymentDLF.php` | Cron: post DLF advance payments |
| `app/Console/Commands/integrationBilling.php` | Cron: integration billing sync |

## Schema

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/schema/paymentSchema.json` | Payment data validation schema |

## Municipal/Government Payments

| File | Key Method | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `app/Municipal.php` | `refundPaymentForFirozabadMun()` :10205 | Government/municipal payment + refund |
